fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the general ledger account.

fields.name: Account Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the purpose of the account. Total: Used to total a series of balances on accounts from many different account groupings. To use Total, leave this field blank. Begin-Total: A marker for the beginning of a series of accounts to be totaled that ends with an End-Total account. End-Total: A total of a series of accounts that starts with the preceding Begin-Total account. The total is defined in the Totaling field.

fields.name: Income/Balance
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether a general ledger account is an income statement account or a balance sheet account.

fields.name: Direct Posting
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether you will be able to post directly or only indirectly to this general ledger account.

fields.name: Balance at Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the G/L account balance on the last date included in the Date Filter field.

fields.name: Net Change
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net change in the account balance during the time period in the Date Filter field.

fields.name: Budgeted Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies either the G/L account's total budget or, if you have specified a name in the Budget Name field, a specific budget.

fields.name: Totaling
fields.tooltip: Specifies an account interval or a list of account numbers. The entries of the account will be totaled to give a total balance. How entries are totaled depends on the value in the Account Type field.

fields.name: Balance
fields.tooltip: Specifies the balance on this account.

fields.name: Consol. Debit Acc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the account number in a consolidated company to transfer credit balances.

fields.name: Consol. Credit Acc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the account number in a consolidated company to transfer credit balances.

fields.name: Gen. Posting Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of transaction.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's or customer's trade type to link transactions made for this business partner with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's product type to link transactions made for this item with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT specification of the involved customer or vendor to link transactions made for this record with the appropriate general ledger account according to the VAT posting setup.

fields.name: VAT Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT specification of the involved item or resource to link transactions made for this record with the appropriate general ledger account according to the VAT posting setup.

fields.name: Additional-Currency Net Change
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net change in the account balance.

fields.name: Add.-Currency Balance at Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the G/L account balance, in the additional reporting currency, on the last date included in the Date Filter field.

fields.name: Additional-Currency Balance
fields.tooltip: Specifies the balance on this account, in the additional reporting currency.
